final_prompt.prompt:
Create a promotional marketing poster for a 跨境电商 campaign.

Style/medium: needs a complex-yet-structured editorial poster aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 horizontal layout; must include layered typographic stacking with product/hero subject physically overlapping and occluding portions of the letterforms
Subject: must include a hero product or focal subject that breaks in front of the type layers
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a dynamic, attention-grabbing promotional atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a bold, high-impact promotional direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include decorative art-lettering as a primary typographic element; stacked type layers as secondary elements — exact copy wording is yours
Constraints: must preserve visual complexity without clutter — layered type, art lettering, and product occlusion must all coexist in a legible hierarchy
Avoid: flat or sparse layouts; chaotic illegible compositions
